title: Nirvana Radio
description: "Replaces the default Minecraft soundtrack with a curated playlist of Nirvana’s legendary grunge hits."
body:
Понял, тогда давай скорректируем описание. Раз это не пластинки, а замена фоновой музыки (background music), описание должно подчеркивать, что это именно полное погружение и замена стандартного саундтрека.

Вот вариант на английском для твоего мода:
🎸 Nirvana Radio: Minecraft Soundtrack Overhaul

Nirvana Radio transforms the quiet, lonely atmosphere of Minecraft into a raw grunge experience. No need to hunt for music discs—this mod replaces or adds to the game's ambient background music, playing Nirvana's legendary hits as you explore, mine, and build.
✨ How it works:

    Seamless Integration: The music functions just like the original Minecraft soundtrack. It triggers naturally as you travel through different biomes or go deep underground.

    The Ultimate Playlist: Includes a curated selection of tracks from Nevermind, In Utero, and Bleach.

    Dynamic Vibe: Experience the heavy riffs during a storm or the melancholic acoustic sessions while watching the sunset.

    No Items Needed: You don't need a jukebox or discs; just install the mod and enjoy the "Teen Spirit" throughout your journey.

🎧 Featured Vibe:

    Mining: Feel the grit of the caves with heavy, distorted tracks.

    Exploration: Wander through forests with the iconic melodies of the 90s Seattle scene.

    Creative Mode: Perfect for long building sessions where you just want to zone out to Kurt’s vocals.

🛠 Technical Note:

This is a client-side music overhaul. It replaces the default music.game and music.creative event triggers with high-quality Nirvana tracks.
